channel.title: Muskan Agarwal — Articles
channel.description: Engineering writing by Muskan Agarwal: AI agents, RAG systems, Angular performance, and honest build logs.

item.title: Demos are not products: auditing my own GitHub
item.description: I went through every public repo and asked one question of each: demo or product? The honest answer was demo, more often than I'd like — and the failure mode was the same in all three cases.

item.title: The replay-demo pattern: show your RAG working without an API key
item.description: How to demo a RAG pipeline honestly, at zero cost, with no abuse surface — by replaying real recorded benchmark runs instead of calling a model on every visitor request.

item.title: Building ClauseLens: what 90.7% retrieval actually took
item.description: Build log for ClauseLens, a hybrid-retrieval RAG pipeline for contracts: structural chunking, BM25 + dense fusion with RRF, citation validation, and the three real bugs the benchmark caught.
